summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close, merge, or fix actions are safe under this job's permissions. Contributor PRs with failed proof stay open; maintainer-owned or ready-for-maintainer PRs stay open for human review.

actions.reason: Keep open for proof/maintainer review; failing proof and related broader work block any fixed-by or superseded closeout.
Keep open as related skills work; proof failure and distinct technical scope require normal review rather than dedupe closeout.
Maintainer-owned draft with useful focused code should remain under maintainer review; this inventory worker cannot merge or repair it.
Focused bug-fix PR with sufficient proof needs maintainer review, but no merge or issue closeout action is allowed in this inventory job.
Maintainer-tracked draft migration should stay open for the planned review/proof path; no close, fix, or merge action is appropriate.

needs_human: #89329: maintainer-owned draft PR needs maintainer review; no merge/fix action is allowed by this job.
#89396: focused contributor bug-fix PR has sufficient proof but still needs maintainer review; merge and post-merge issue closeout are blocked by job permissions.
#89518: maintainer-tracked draft migration PR is broad session-state work and requires maintainer review/proof outside this inventory shard.
